name: Autoklose

auth.notes: api_token passed as a URI/query parameter; token is generated from the Autoklose API/integrations page.

pagination: Paginated GET endpoints return links/meta; page defaults to 1 and per_page defaults to 25 with a documented maximum of 100.
notes: Generated from the Tier 2/Tier 3 parallel specialist scout wave.
Use source links to refresh endpoint-level details before implementation.
Official Autoklose help links to the public API reference; the Postman document has a 2025 changelog.
